dublinCore.dc:title: 110 S4344 PCS: To extend section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act of 1978 for 3 years.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Cotton (for himself and Mr. Grassley) introduced the following bill; which was read the first time
Read the second time and placed on the calendar

form.official-title: To extend section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act of 1978 for 3 years.

section.header: Extension of section 702 authority for 3 years

subsection.text: Section 403(b) of the FISA Amendments Act of 2008 (Public Law 110–261; 122 Stat. 2474) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (1) (50 U.S.C. 1881 note), by striking two years after the date of enactment of the Reforming Intelligence and Securing America Act and inserting April 20, 2029; and

in paragraph (2) (18 U.S.C. 2511 note), in the matter preceding subparagraph (A), by striking two years after the date of enactment of the Reforming Intelligence and Securing America Act and inserting April 20, 2029.

subsection.text: Section 404(b)(1) of the FISA Amendments Act of 2008 (Public Law 110–261; 122 Stat. 2476), is amended, in the heading, by striking two years after the date of enactment of the Reforming Intelligence and Securing America Act and inserting April 20, 2029.

endorsement.action-desc: Read the second time and placed on the calendar
